roadmap.title: Build eight-Legend progress
roadmap.description: Rotate through eight Legends in normal Battle Royale. Keep each Legend active until its Damage Done tracker reaches 5,000, and record a win before moving on.

roadmap.title: Cover the four required classes
roadmap.description: Make four of the eight winning Legends an Assault, Controller, Support, and Recon character so the class achievements stack with Apex Legend.

roadmap.title: Match-flow achievements
roadmap.description: Take Jumpmaster five times, revive one eliminated teammate at a beacon, and push for the first three-kill Kill Leader opportunity while completing the long-term goals.

roadmap.title: Legendary loot cleanup
roadmap.description: Equip one fully kitted gold weapon, then hold two qualifying Legendary equipment items simultaneously for the two loot achievements.

achievements.summary: Earn match XP until the player account reaches level 50.

guide.context: Kills, revives, victories, and high squad placement all add XP, so this progresses alongside every other achievement.

steps.text: Complete matches and contribute kills, revives, or strong squad placements to earn player XP.
Continue until the account-level display reaches 50.

achievements.description: Equip any 2 legendary equipment items at the same time
achievements.summary: Hold two @item{Legendary gold equipment items} at the same time, such as a gold weapon and gold backpack.

guide.context: Current confirmed combinations include a Legendary weapon plus Legendary backpack or two Legendary weapons; gold attachments by themselves do not qualify.

steps.text: Search Care Packages and Mythic Bins for @item{Legendary gold weapons}, or obtain a @item{Legendary gold backpack}.
Ask squadmates to drop qualifying gold items if the team has collected two between them.
Equip both Legendary items simultaneously and keep them equipped until Steam posts the achievement.

achievements.summary: Collect an eliminated squadmate's banner and return that player through a @mechanic{Respawn Beacon}.

guide.context: An unused fixed beacon has a green map icon and hologram. A Mobile Respawn Beacon also works, and Support squads can recover expired banners at a Replicator.

steps.text: After a squadmate is fully eliminated, approach the death box and press @mechanic{Interact}—E by default on PC—to collect the banner.
Travel to an unused @mechanic{Respawn Beacon}, or deploy a @item{Mobile Respawn Beacon}.
Hold @mechanic{Interact} at the beacon until the dropship returns the eliminated squadmate.

achievements.summary: Equip one @item{fully kitted Legendary gold weapon}.

guide.context: A pre-kitted gold or Supply Drop weapon qualifies; merely filling an ordinary weapon's slots with lower-rarity attachments does not.

steps.text: Search a Care Package or the map's marked Hot Zone for a fully kitted gold weapon.
Pick up and equip the gold weapon, or briefly equip one dropped by a squadmate.

achievements.summary: Remain squad Jumpmaster and launch the squad from the dropship in five matches.

guide.context: The role is assigned automatically, but the assigned player can relinquish it to a teammate; Left Control is the default PC relinquish input.

steps.text: When assigned Jumpmaster, keep the role; otherwise ask the current Jumpmaster to use @mechanic{Relinquish}.
Choose a landing point and launch the squad from the dropship.
Repeat the Jumpmaster launch in five separate matches.

achievements.summary: Accumulate at least 5,000 lifetime damage with each of eight different @npc{Legends}.

guide.context: Damage against Knockdown Shields and Gibraltar's Gun Shield does not increase Damage Done. Current reports also show that the Steam unlock can wait for a normal Battle Royale match even when Wildcard damage counted.

steps.text: From the main menu, open @mechanic{Legends}, choose a Legend, then open @mechanic{Banners → Trackers → Damage Done}.
Play normal Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale with that Legend until the tracker reaches at least 5,000.
Reach 5,000 Damage Done on seven more different Legends.
If Steam does not post the achievement, start another normal Battle Royale match after all eight trackers are above 5,000.

achievements.summary: Reach at least three kills and hold the match's @mechanic{Kill Leader} title, even briefly.

guide.context: The first Kill Leader is the first player to reach three kills; the title can later transfer to the next-highest killer when the current leader dies.

steps.text: Choose an early contested landing if the squad can survive the opening fight, or prepare to third-party a damaged squad later.
Secure at least three personal kills, then either overtake the current leader's total or become the next-highest killer when that leader dies.
Watch for the @mechanic{You are the new Kill Leader} announcement confirming the title.

achievements.description: Win a game as an assault character
achievements.summary: Win a normal Battle Royale match while playing a @npc{Legend with the Assault class icon}.

guide.context: Bangalore, Fuse, and Mad Maggie are current official Assault examples; the roster's class badge is the authoritative check after updates.

steps.text: Queue Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale and select a Legend marked with the @mechanic{Assault} class icon.
Survive with the squad until the match ends with the @mechanic{You are the Champion} screen.

achievements.description: Win a game as a controller character
achievements.summary: Win a normal Battle Royale match while playing a @npc{Legend with the Controller class icon}.

guide.context: The Steam API still calls this Defense, but the current description uses Controller after the class rework. Caustic, Wattson, and Catalyst are official Controller examples.

steps.text: Queue Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale and select a Legend marked with the @mechanic{Controller} class icon.
Survive with the squad until the match ends with the @mechanic{You are the Champion} screen.

achievements.description: Win a game as a support character
achievements.summary: Win a normal Battle Royale match while playing a @npc{Legend with the Support class icon}.

guide.context: Lifeline, Gibraltar, Conduit, and Loba are current official Support examples; the roster badge remains authoritative when classes change.

steps.text: Queue Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale and select a Legend marked with the @mechanic{Support} class icon.
Survive with the squad until the match ends with the @mechanic{You are the Champion} screen.

achievements.description: Win a game as a recon character
achievements.summary: Win a normal Battle Royale match while playing a @npc{Legend with the Recon class icon}.

guide.context: Bloodhound, Crypto, and Valkyrie are current official Recon examples; the roster badge remains authoritative when classes change.

steps.text: Queue Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale and select a Legend marked with the @mechanic{Recon} class icon.
Survive with the squad until the match ends with the @mechanic{You are the Champion} screen.

achievements.description: Win a game with 8 different Legends
achievements.summary: Win normal Battle Royale matches with eight different @npc{Legends}.

guide.context: Each Legend has a separate Wins tracker, so checking that counter prevents duplicate victories from being mistaken for new progress.

steps.text: Open a Legend's @mechanic{Banners → Trackers → Wins} entry to check whether that Legend already has a victory.
Queue Unranked or Ranked Battle Royale with a Legend whose Wins tracker is zero and finish first.
Switch to another Legend with no recorded victory and continue until eight different Legends each have a win.
